---
title: "Search Strategy"
output: html_notebook
---

# EBSCO (Medline, sportdiscuss, Psycinfo, psycarticle, cinahl)

1818 results

**Search strategy**: ((MH "Depression" OR MH "Affective Disorders" OR MH "Depressive Disorder" OR ‚Äúdepressi‚àó‚Äù OR ‚Äúdepressive disorder‚Äù)) AND ((MH "Therapeutic Exercise" OR MH "Exercise" OR MH "Physical Activity" OR MH "Exercise Therapy" OR "Exercis‚àó" OR "exercise Therap‚àó" OR "Strength training" OR "Resistance training" OR "physical activit‚àó")) AND ((MH ‚ÄúBehavior‚Äù OR MH ‚ÄúPersonal Boundaries‚Äù OR MH "Patient Preference" OR ‚Äúpreference‚àó‚Äù OR ‚ÄúAdherence‚Äù OR ‚ÄúCompliance‚Äù OR ‚Äúexpectation‚àó‚Äù OR ‚Äúbarrier‚àó‚Äù OR ‚Äúlimitation‚àó‚Äù OR ‚Äúmotiv‚àó‚Äù OR ‚Äúreason‚àó‚Äù OR ‚Äúincentive‚àó‚Äù OR ‚Äúattitude‚àó‚Äù)) AND (‚Äúqualitative‚Äù OR ‚Äúqualitative stud‚àó‚Äù)

# Scopus 

862 results

**Search strategy**: TITLE-ABS-KEY ( "depressi‚àó" OR "depressive disorder" ) AND TITLE-ABS-KEY ( "Exercis‚àó" OR "Strength training" OR "Resistance training" OR "physical activit‚àó" ) AND TITLE-ABS-KEY ( "preference‚àó" OR "Adherence" OR "Compliance" OR "expectation‚àó" OR "barrier‚àó" OR "limitation‚àó" OR "motiv‚àó" OR "reason‚àó" OR "incentive‚àó" OR "attitude‚àó" ) AND TITLE-ABS-KEY ("qualitative" OR "qualitative stud‚àó")

# WOS

1243 results 

**Search strategy**: (((TS=("depressi‚àó" OR "depressive disorder")) AND TS=(( "Exercis‚àó" OR "Strength training" OR "Resistance training" OR "physical activit‚àó")) AND TS=("preference‚àó" OR "Adherence" OR "Compliance" OR "expectation‚àó" OR "barrier‚àó" OR "limitation‚àó" OR "motiv‚àó" OR "reason‚àó" OR "incentive‚àó" OR "attitude‚àó" )) AND TS=("qualitative" OR "qualitative stud‚àó"))
